claims.text: We claim: 1. A liquid composition for oral administration, comprising: i. terazosin or a pharmaceutically acceptable salt thereof in an amount of about 1 to about 5 mg/mL; ii. about 0.15 mg/mL to abou...
17. A method of treating symptomatic benign prostatic hyperplasia (BPH) comprising administering to a patient in need thereof a therapeutically effective amount of the liquid composition of claim 1 .
